Calling PushAxisAlignedClip() while the render target has a non-upright transform set on it. This will result in content outside the bounds of this rectangle being drawn, because the actual clip used for rendering is the axis-aligned bounding box of the clip rect AFTER being transformed. Usually this is not what you want. To avoid this, use PushLayer() with an IRectangleGeometry, or use an ARC::RectangleClip (which calls PushLayer() when needed).
